description: Style Note A brightly coloured shoe - this pair of sandals gets the season look right with the floral detail and pared down styling of the upper. This pair from enroute are apt for the beach and will look great with your cropped pants as well! Product Details Red forefoot strap with a toe separator and a floral detail and a midfoot strap extending to the forefoot strap diagonally Brown heel cup with a buckled ankle strap Soft leather footbed Upper adhered to the outsole Rubber outsole which is textured at the forefoot and heel region Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth when needed
